rows.label: qev051513_MSG0001
rows.name:
The moment you began fighting,
Veven said he didn't even need to watch to know the result
and went home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051513_MSG0002
rows.name:
Perhaps he didn't want to watch his prized guard machine
be defeated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051513_MSG0003
rows.name:
...I'll repair that guard machine immediately
and return to the Biahno Water Purification Plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051513_MSG0004
rows.name:
There are no native creatures as strong as you, and
with abilities like this, it should be fully capable
of defending the area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051513_MSG0005
rows.name: Thank you for the valuable data.[ST:wait ]
